import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; // SVGs const SlotIcon = () => ( ); const MessageIcon = () => ( ); const ResourceIcon = () => ( ); const ViewBookingsIcon = () => ( ); const actionCards = [ { title: 'Book Slots', description: 'Reserve time with staff members for focused academic support.', icon: , to: '/slots', }, { title: 'Messages', description: 'Continue discussions with staff or ask quick follow-up questions.', icon: , to: '/chat', }, { title: 'Resources', description: 'Review uploaded notes, materials, and study references.', icon: , to: '/materials', }, { title: 'My Bookings', description: 'Track your scheduled sessions and upcoming learning commitments.', icon: , to: '/slots?view=booked', }, ]; const workflowItems = [ 'Review available staff schedules and select a relevant session.', 'Prepare your questions in advance to make the discussion efficient.', 'Use chat for follow-up clarification and quick doubt resolution.', 'Keep materials organized for revision before and after sessions.', ]; const StudentDashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); return (
Student Workspace

Welcome back, {user?.name}

Plan sessions, stay on top of conversations, and keep your study support organized from one premium learning workspace seamlessly blending communication and scheduling.

Priority
Upcoming Sessions
Focus
Clear Doubts Faster
Access
Resources in One Place
{actionCards.map((card) => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}

{card.description}

))}
How to Work Effectively
{workflowItems.map((item, index) => (
{index + 1}
{item}
))}
Study Direction
Before a session List the exact concept or problem you want resolved.
During a session Capture key points and decisions immediately.
After a session Revisit uploaded materials and confirm unresolved points in chat.
Consistency Maintain a regular review schedule for stronger retention.
); }; export default StudentDashboard;
